incident.finding: both release requests returned HTTP 200 and the Runtime store reported deleted, but the SandboxClaim and Sandbox resources remained Ready in Kubernetes

recovery.method: repeat the governed release endpoint after the suite fully settled

runtimeBackend.behaviorBefore: mark the Runtime binding deleted immediately after kubectl delete returned success
runtimeBackend.behaviorAfter: poll both SandboxClaim and Sandbox until absent; timeout returns an error and leaves the binding non-deleted
runtimeBackend.reasonNotDeployed: the cohort freezes Runtime Deployment identity; deploying this code requires a new prepared session

currentSessionRunner.behavior: require two successful governed release responses before recording released=true; otherwise fail closed as sandbox_release_failed

newScenarios: release waits through a present-resource observation until terminal absence
release timeout does not mark the binding deleted
